original_image_tags: A blue text box overlay at the top reads: "This image contains all the information on the document."

elements.description: Typed 'Office Memorandum' document dated 7/10/47 regarding 'FLYING DISKS'. Includes standard form header, typed body text discussing Brigadier General Schulgen and S.W. Reynolds, and a routing list in the upper right. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no photographs, sketches, or diagrams, describing it as a typed memorandum only.
